revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1334345885|1334345885]] by [[Special:Contributions/Sdkb|Sdkb]] ([[User talk:Sdkb|talk]]) please don't;
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1334345885|1334345885]] by [[Special:Contributions/Sdkb|Sdkb]] ([[User talk:Sdkb|talk]]) please don't;

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_Style_1 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Citation Style 1 | title = [[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]] | below = [[Help talk:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1 noticeboard]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | selected = {{{1|}}} | group1 = General
templates | list1 = ; {{tl|Cite book}} : books ; {{tl|Cite conference}} : conference papers ; {{tl|Cite document}} : short, stand-alone, offline documents ; {{tl|Cite encyclopedia}} : edited collections ; {{tl|Cite interview}} : interviews ; {{tl|Cite journal}} : academic journals ; {{tl|Cite magazine}} : magazines ; {{tl|Cite mailing list}} : public mailing lists ; {{tl|Cite map}} : maps ; {{tl|Cite news}} : news articles ; {{tl|Cite newsgroup}} : online newsgroups ; {{tl|Cite press release}} : press releases ; {{tl|Cite report}} : unpublished reports ; {{tl|Cite sign}} : signs, plaques ; {{tl|Cite speech}} : speeches ; {{tl|Cite tech report}} : technical reports ; {{tl|Cite thesis}} : theses ; {{tl|Cite web}} : web sources | group2 = Preprint templates | list2 = * {{tl|Cite arXiv}} * {{tl|Cite bioRxiv}} * {{tl|Cite CiteSeerX}} * {{tl|Cite medRxiv}} * {{tl|Cite SSRN}} | group3 = Audiovisual-related | list3 = * {{tl|Cite AV media}} * {{tl|Cite AV media notes}} * {{tl|Cite episode}} * {{tl|Cite podcast}} * {{tl|Cite serial}} | group4 = Categories | list4 = * [[:Category:Citation Style 1 templates|Citation Style 1 templates]] * [[:Category:Citation Style 1 specific-source templates|Citation Style 1 specific-source templates]] | group5 = Documentation | list5 = * {{tl|Citation Style documentation}} }} {{Documentation}}
